message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects, one per question. Each object has keys: "question", "feedback", "complies". The "question" field should be one word: "Chapters", "Description", or "Structure" depending on which question. Provide feedback about the text regarding that question. Determine compliance.

We have text: It is introduction final section. It doesn't list main sections. So question 1: Chapters. Does the text list main sections? No. So compliance false. Provide feedback: No listing of sections, missing outline.

Question 2: Description. Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It does not describe contents of each section; it just outlines the problem and context. So compliance false.

Question 3: Structure. Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No, because no sections listed or described. So compliance false.

Thus all three false. Provide feedback accordingly.

Make sure JSON array with exactly 3 objects. No extra. Provide as per format.
